PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Helen N. Han appearing in person (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the court procedures and assignment of probate referees. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 31, 2008 is admitted to probate. Helen N. Han is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on Inventory and Appraisal is set for October 2, 2023 at 9:00am, in dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for July 15 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
